Transparency First

You deserve to know
what you're eating.

7 ingredients.
Nothing hidden.

Most snacks hide behind a wall of INS codes, emulsifiers, and artificial flavourings. Every Veera pack is built on ingredients you can pronounce — and lab-tested to prove every claim.

Ragi Flour. Sunflower Oil. Rock Salt. Black Pepper. Chaat Masala. Natural Vitamin E. That's it.

Lab Verified

Lab Verified.
Nothing Hidden.

Every Veera pack carries a QR code linked to its FSSAI-certified third-party lab report. Scan it. Read it. Trust it.

Third Party Lab Tested
FSSAI Certified Lab, Mumbai · Independent verification, every batch.
Sugar Content: 0.8g per 100g
Tested and verified. Not just claimed on the label.
Pesticide Residue: Not Detected
Zero pesticide residue across all 3 SKUs. Every single batch.
Smart Reminders

We know when you're
about to run out.

CRM-powered replenishment nudges sent via WhatsApp, email, and SMS — timed to your consumption pattern, not a random calendar.

V
Veera Foods
WhatsApp · Day 22
Hey Ria 👋 Your Ragi Crunch is probably running low — based on your order history you've got about 5–7 days left. Want us to send the next batch before you run out?

🎁 Reorder now and get 5% off as a loyalty thank-you.
The replenishment timeline
Day 0
Customer places first order. CRM records order date + product cadence.
Day ~20
CRM predicts stock-out window (±3 days accuracy after 3 orders).
Day ~22
WhatsApp nudge sent via Shiprocket Engage API with personalised message.
Day ~25
If no action: email + push notification triggered automatically.
Day ~28
Final SMS reminder with 5% "come back" discount if still no reorder.
The retention math
62% organic repeat → 70%+ systematic repeat = ₹3 Cr incremental annual revenue at zero CAC. LTV moves from ₹1,280 → ₹2,240 per customer.
